mnemonics: S.T.O.P. - Struct Type, Open brace, Properties, semicolon
keyPoints: Use the 'struct' keyword followed by the structure tag name.
List member variables (properties) inside curly braces {}.
End the declaration with a semicolon ;.
commonMistakes: Forgetting the semicolon at the end of the struct declaration.
Trying to initialize member values inside the struct declaration (e.g., int x = 0;).
